source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Two simple harmonic transverse waves, $P$ and $Q$, propagate along the positive and negative $x$-axis, respectively. They have the same direction of vibration, an amplitude of 5 cm, a wavelength of ${8}\mathsf{m}$, and a wave speed of $4\mathsf{m}/\mathsf{s}$. The wave profiles of $P$ and $Q$ at $t=2.5s$ are shown in the figure. At $t=0$, wave $P$ just reaches the origin, and the particle at the origin will start to vibrate downwards from its equilibrium position; wave $Q$ just reaches $x=10\mathrm{m}$, and the particle at $x=10\mathrm{m}$ will start to vibrate upwards from its equilibrium position. After a period of time, the two waves meet.

1. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is maximized due to the interference of the two waves.
2. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is minimized due to the interference of the two waves.
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
最大平衡位置：x=3\mathrm{m}, 7\mathrm{m}
最小平衡位置：x=1\mathrm{m}, 5\mathrm{m}, 9\mathrm{m}

issues: metadata.image_paths and top-level image_paths are inconsistent.

image_dependency: 题干明确写到“wave profiles of P and Q at t = 2.5 s are shown in the figure”，关键信息来自图像。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明不是纯文本可充分求解的问题。
需要从图中读取两列波形在给定时刻的相位/空间位置关系，属于强图像依赖。
multi_step: 需结合两列波的传播方向、振动起始方向、波长、波速和 t=2.5 s 时的图像信息来重建相位关系。
问题分为求振幅最大位置和振幅最小位置，通常需要先建立干涉条件，再筛选图示范围内的平衡位置。
这是图文联合的物理推理，不是单步读数或直接识别。
verifiability: 答案形式是有限位置集合（x = 3 m, 7 m；x = 1 m, 5 m, 9 m），结果边界清晰，便于核验。
题目给出了足够多的物理参数（振幅、波长、波速、传播方向、初始条件），理论上可通过规则或公式复算。
但最终结论依赖图中波形读取，图像质量仅中等（readability_score=0.656），因此不打满分。

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths and top-level image_paths are inconsistent.

decision_reasons: Question, answer, and the primary image are all present, so the core semantics remain recoverable.
The sample is strongly figure-dependent (image_dependency_score=0.96), and the noted moderate image readability creates usability risk.
There is a metadata inconsistency in image paths, so the asset package is not fully clean even though the image file exists.
Initial scoring is otherwise strong, so this should stay in the candidate pool but below cleaner samples.

After a period of time, the two waves meet.

1. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is maximized due to the interference of the two waves.
2. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is minimized due to the interference of the two waves.
variants.expected_answer:
最大平衡位置：x = 3\mathrm{m}, 7\mathrm{m}
最小平衡位置：x = 1\mathrm{m}, 5\mathrm{m}, 9\mathrm{m}

open_ended_problem_variants.title: PhysReason 开放题
open_ended_problem_variants.rewritten_question_text:
Two simple harmonic transverse waves, P and Q, propagate along the positive and negative x-axis, respectively. They have the same direction of vibration, an amplitude of 5 cm, a wavelength of 8 m, and a wave speed of 4 m/s. The wave profiles of P and Q at t = 2.5 s are shown in the figure. At t = 0, wave P just reaches the origin, and the particle at the origin starts to vibrate downwards from its equilibrium position; wave Q just reaches x = 10 m, and the particle at x = 10 m starts to vibrate upwards from its equilibrium position. After a period of time, the two waves meet.

1. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is maximized due to the interference of the two waves.
2. Determine the equilibrium positions within the range shown in the figure where the medium's vibration amplitude is minimized due to the interference of the two waves.
open_ended_problem_variants.expected_answer:
最大平衡位置：x = 3\mathrm{m}, 7\mathrm{m}
最小平衡位置：x = 1\mathrm{m}, 5\mathrm{m}, 9\mathrm{m}
